pageContext.name: Wolverine & Colossus: Fastball Special!
pageContext.description: Okay, then — just like we did in the Danger Room!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Wolverine & Colossus: Fastball Special! Fine Art Print, an action-packed original Marvel art print by artist Derrick Chew, AKA DCWJ.  When it comes to super hero tag-team moves, nothing can beat a Fastball Special! As metallic mutant Colossus winds up the pitch, Wolverine prepares to hit speeds topping 200 miles per hour with his claws at the ready. This vibrant scene by Derrick Chew captures the explosive energy of the signature X-Men maneuver as a Sentinel comes crashing down behind them.  Each Wolverine & Colossus: Fastball Special! Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed format, this archival quality giclée X-Men wall art will make a long-lasting addition to any X-Men collection.  Coming in hot! Catch the Wolverine & Colossus: Fastball Special! Fine Art Print by Derrick Chew for your display today.
